description_long: This is a modern, rectangular chest of drawers with a sleek, minimalist design. The exterior is finished in a matte black color, giving it a contemporary and understated appearance. The chest features three wide drawers, each with a flat front and no visible handles, contributing to its clean lines. The unit is elevated on thin, black metal legs that form a geometric base, providing both stability and a touch of industrial style. The overall construction appears to be primarily wood or engineered wood, with metal used for the legs and internal drawer mechanisms. There are no visible decorative embellishments, locks, or branding on the surfaces.
description: A sleek, matte black chest of drawers with three handle-less drawers and thin metal legs, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three wide, flat-front drawers and the thin metal legs beneath.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the chest and the geometric metal leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back panel and the supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and leg design.
